positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest. Silhouettes of majestic, bioluminescent flora and fauna inhabit a dense grove under a sprawling nebula sky. The trees feature curved, organic lines and exaggerated, stylized shapes, glowing in cool shades of indigo, sapphire blue, and lavender, contrasted by warm, subtle glows of neon peach and turquoise. Composition should be centered, highly symmetrical, and abstract enough to work as an all-over apparel print. The style should be vector art inspired, with sharp, clean edges and high contrast, resembling modern psychedelic screen printing. Conceptually, it blends natural forms with deep space aesthetics. Studio lighting, high resolution, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifact, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive detail, photorealism, ugly, noise, poor anatomy, distorted, extra limbs
